items.title: The recent Aaron Rodgers press conference included an interesting exchange
items.summary: Steelers quarterback Aaron Rodgers has said that, when he's done playing, he plans to disappear.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: England v New Zealand: second women’s T20 cricket international – live
items.summary: England chasing target of 171 to win at Canterbury Capsey steers England to opening win | Email Tanya Gaze has a hasty heave and loses her middle stump to a cracking ball that n...
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Charlton earn WSL promotion after Whitehouse penalty heroics
items.summary: Charlton Athletic beat Leicester City to earn their first promotion to the WSL courtesy of goalkeeper Sophie Whitehouse's penalty shootout heroics, relegating the Foxes to WSL2.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
